title: Notice: Prescription Drug List (PDL): Ibuprofen - Canada.ca
content:
## Notice: Prescription Drug List (PDL): Ibuprofen
August 18, 2016 Our file number: 16-109277-453
The purpose of this Notice of Amendment is to notify that Health Canada will switch certain uses of Ibuprofen to nonprescription status for human use by modifying the Human Prescription Drug List (PDL). The Veterinary List will remain unchanged. Health Canada has conducted a scientific review of Ibuprofen against a set of established and publicly available criteria outlined in section C.01.040.3 of the Food and Drug Regulations. The listing now reads:
Drugs containing the following: Ibuprofen or its salts
- An oral dosage form that provides 400 milligrams or less per dosage unit; or
- A modified-release oral dosage form that provides 600 milligrams or less per dosage unit.
Effective Date: Date of this Notice
Should you have any questions on this update to the Prescription Drug List, please contact:
Prescription Drug Status Committee Health Canada Holland Cross, Tower B, 2nd Floor 1600 Scott Street Address Locator 3102C3 Ottawa, Ontario K1A 0K9
Email: drug_prescription_status-statut_d'ordonnance_des_drogues@hc-sc.gc.ca Telephone: 613-957-1058 Telecopier: 613-941-1812
